title: llm.summarize
description: Summarize plain text or a NormalizedTranscript dict (exactly one of text/transcript). Single-shot when the input fits one ~15k-token chunk, map-reduce otherwise. Returns {status: 'ok', summary: string, usage: {input_tokens, output_tokens}} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}.

language.description: Language to respond in; defaults to the input's.
